reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Miraculously useful app! What a wonderful app that works through headphones or openly. Set your sound environment, either block out daily noise when wearing headphones because you can find a "noise" canceling sound, or use it openly to apply a soothing sound to fall asleep by. It even works as an alarm clock upon selecting an appropriate noise to wake by. Universally useful on my Kindle HD. Review 2: rating 5.0. helps me to sleep I love all the sounds, but the cat purring puts me to sleep the quickest. It's a great app for background noise. Review 3: rating 5.0. Just right This is a very well-conceived white noise app with a good variety of choices. My whole family uses this and everyone has their favorite "color". Brown Noise is perfect for me as it most closely resembles the fan I use with this app when it's hot at night. I have several different white noise apps, but I always come back to this one. Very well done and easy to use. Review 4: rating 1.0. Too Bad Great idea. Poor implementation. The sound loops are very short, with the result that some sound like the end of an old record. I tried to download additional sounds. They did not download to the app. Review 5: rating 2.0. not useful as it could be. Needs a setting to start (like most other alarm clock apps) when docked or plugged in. Otherwise too much trouble to bother with. Keep looking. Review 6: rating 2.0. Some Tips. Less motor noise. More of a soft wind sound. I sleep with a fan 365 days a year. I have used Industrial size fans that are less noisy than yours. Also please install a stop switch or an off button.
Sincerely, Jennifer Martin Review 7: rating 5.0. Perfect app for Kindle Fire I am VERY sensitive to noise of all kinds. I initially purchased White Noise Lite (which is free). Although it worked quite well, the free version only runs alone, which means you can't read a Kindle book at the same time you use White Noise Lite. I decided that a couple of bucks was a small price to pay to block out my boyfriend's rock band rehearsal while I read.

There are so many great choices for noises on the White Noise app -- many more th... Review 8: rating 4.0. Good nights rest Great app with many options to find a sound that works for you. Alarm clock is another good feature. Sleeping much better these days. One down fall is that you cannot combine sounds. Review 9: rating 5.0. Wide selection of sounds I'm very happy with White Noise. I have downloaded other apps in the past (years ago) and they were all OK, but for whatever reason I didn't end up using them regularly. I think it's partially because I have more free time now, but in any event, this app is getting regular use and I enjoy picking different sounds for different moods. I'm most partial to Tibetan Bowl, when I really want to let my mind wander. Review 10: rating 5.0. Great for my needs I really enjoy this app and the many different sound options it has. I really like that I can use it on my kindle fire and turn off the screen. It will still run and uses very little battery life even while running for 8 hours. I'm very happy that this was a FAOTD awhile ago or I would have probably never tried it. I would only ask that developers consider putting in a "rain on a metal roof" sound, that's the only one I can think that's missing that my hu... Review 11: rating 5.0. saved my sleep I usually have a manual white noise machine going at night...it blocked out street noise and helped my kids and I sleep. BUT it drives my husband nuts and now that we've moved to a quieter location he really needed a change for his own sleep sanity. Time will tell if this will be a lasting solution, but for the time being it has really helped me. And I LOVE that there is a combination rain and thunder storm option...square! Review 12: rating 4.0. Pretty neat for hearing one background sound to sooth or drown out.. Apps that let me mix sounds bog me down occasionally, so this will help when I'm short on whiles to wile away. Here is a diversity of single sound loops, some loopier sounding than others, with an easy interface for easy picking. Works OK on my Pantech Element tablet. Review 13: rating 5.0. Helps me sleep! Especially when I'm not in my bed. But I have the free one on my phone and I bought this one on my kindle fire and I'll never ever settle for the free version of this app again. I have so many choices! Awesome app!! Review 14: rating 5.0. tinnitus sufferers will appteciate I have extreme tinnitus involving hearing loss & a brain hit by Lyme disease (& body of course) that began taking noise from memory files. (As explained by a tinnitus specialist) . I spent $4,000 on special hearing aids that input white noise onto corrected hearing. Operates by a remote control. I can't wear them to bed, at the quietest time when tinnitus is at its peak w several auditory noises & scrambled voices that are unbearable . As I'm bed ri... Review 15: rating 2.0. Not great Maybe this app wasn't for me, but I didn't care for it. I actually ended up deleting this app. I didn't use it. Review 16: rating 5.0. This is really Awesome Wrote noise helps me go to sleep at night and distracts me with soothing sounds that distract me from all the noises in my house. You should get white noise it is an amazing app. Review 17: rating 5.0. Fantastic Sleep/Relaxation App One of My Favorites I have many sleep and relaxation sound machine apps. This is one of my two favorites. There are several options for sounds from airplanes to frying bacon (ok it really sounds kind of neat).

You have a nice picture to look at while the sound is playing, settings so it can be personalized and a timer and wake up options. Volume of sounds are adjustable.

I highly recommend this one for ease of use, price and qu... Review 18: rating 5.0. Impressive Sound Engine This does a great job of creating ambient noise, which can be really relaxing and helps me relax or even fall asleep. There are over 40 noises, including ocean sounds, running water, and rain (if you can't tell, I like water noises). There is also wind, a clothes dryer, airplane, and tons more. I'm surprised at the selection, first of all, but I'm blown away by how realistic all the noises sound. It is a great way to get some relaxing background noise. Review 19: rating 3.0. good for free app I am writing this review because of the nag screen. If I had paid for this app I would be mad.

The sounds were of good quality and it will let you multi task. Brown noise was my favorite. Review 20: rating 4.0. It does the job. I have tinnitus--a constant ringing sound in my ears--and this app creates just the right noise level to block it out and let me sleep. I haven't encountered any of the problems cited in the negative reviews posted here, but I am docking the rating by one star to caution others that they might not have the same positive experience I have.
reference_output: rating 5.0. I love this app I love this app. I like all the different sounds and the way you can combine them to make your own custom sound. This is the first app I ever actually paid to have the full version so I could have it running in the background and still use my phone for other things.

I play on my kindle fire so obviously a smaller surface area but still an e... Review 2: rating 1.0. I never know when I exit the app, if ... reference_output: rating 4.0. Grandkids love it It is pretty simple.  The kids (2 and 3) learn the mechanics quickly.  They especially like the puzzle games. The instructions from the 'moderator' are clear, and assuming they want to succeed, rather than just push buttons, the can follow it.Like any game, there is a tendency for the kids to just push buttons repeatedly regardless of the outcome.  I would recommend the developer add some sort of additional feature to encourage a try of a different option.

persona: This customer prioritizes affordability and practical functionality, opting for mid-range accessories that deliver basic performance without overspending, and values ease of setup and compatibility with existing devices for specific troubleshooting needs.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Best tool in my tool box! It connects everytime, no matter what app I'm using. The info I get from it, about my vehicles is priceless! Engine load, mpg, throttle position, speed, rpms, engine temperature, manifold pressure, ignition timing and even more info than that! Gives a read on all sensors AND - it clears check engine codes. Awesome tool. Fantastic price! Review 2: rating 5.0. Cleared the Codes! Fast connection, Fast diagnostics, fast clearing of my engine codes. Even told me how many engines starts and miles I had gone since the code came on. Review 3: rating 4.0. very nice app I've used it only a few times, but it has some very good features. Haven't tried Torque Pro yet...
The gauge config and design functions are very nice... the graphing is good and diagnostic / PID info is all there. For $3, it is impressive! I paired with a BAFX ODB-II bluetooth adapter from Amazon.

I would recommend this app. Review 4: rating 4.0. Works great if you can figure it out The instructions for installation and set up are lacking. Hit and miss is a great waste of time because set-up is not intuitive. It is a great application if it is figured out. Review 5: rating 5.0. Absolutely what I was looking for and more. If you're looking for an app to go with your ELM327, look no further. After playing with various applications on both Apple and Android platforms, this was one of my two favorites along with Torque, which requires side loading on Amazon devices. I'm keeping my HDX pure, and TouchScan fits the bill perfectly. You can edit every aspect of your gauges and I mean EVERY aspect. It does custom PIDs, data logging, map integration and more. If... Review 6: rating 5.0. Awesome Value! This app is awesome paired with my ELM327. I use high end scan tools on a daily basis ( Snap-On, and factory Ford & GM ). This is by far the best value for an at home scan tool. It not only displays the codes and readiness monitors for emissions testing, but it also shows live data stream and mode 6 for the more advanced users. Overall, great app. Worth every penny. Review 7: rating 5.0. awesome diagnostic tool This app completes my purchase of the obd2 scanner. Does mpgs clears codes and reads many if not all of the onboard sensors on my rx8 and mazda 5. This is the first app like this for kindle that is stable and will do everything you expect from an obd2 scanner app. Review 8: rating 4.0. Fine product Connected right away to my BAFX code reader. I am sure it was just something I am not doing correctly as this was the first time I had ever used a code reader. This app has all the bells and whistles, now all I have to do... I took a chance on TouchScan to use with my Fire HDX. I was pleasantly surprised at how well it worked. There isn't quite as much customization as Torque, but it's a well made app that functions exactly as expected, and retains all the core functionality that a good phone/tablet based a... Bought touchscan on a whim and right out of the box it gives me the guages i wanted, the reports and graphs a wanted. It's like they tapped my brain for ideas. Love it. Run it everyday now. reference_output: rating 4.0. Nice, inexpensive auto diagnostic tool. I bought this mostly for use on a Chevrolet diesel pickup truck.  I didn't invest in a high-priced blutooth module, just a moderate one, but it sync'd up easily with this app on my Fire Phone and provides access to a few sensors.  I can't get it to read boost pressure, but the other standard gauges work ok.  I use it mostly as a speedometer for now, as the gauge cluster on the truck is having the well-known issues with the stepper motors.  When weather warms up I'll remove the cluster and send it off for repair.  In the meantime, this works well.
